default.quote: I used to wake up anxious about whether my site had been compromised overnight. Jetpack Scan monitors it around the clock and has caught real threats before they became disasters. That peace of mind alone is worth every penny.
default.name: Sarah Nguyen
default.title: Food Blogger @ TasteWithSarah.com

default.quote: A botched plugin update once wiped three years of product content in seconds. Since switching to Jetpack Backup, I've restored my site twice without losing a single post. One-click restores actually work.
default.name: Marcus Okafor
default.title: Owner @ GardenSupplyDirect.com

default.quote: My client's WooCommerce store was bleeding sales from slow page loads. After enabling Jetpack Boost, their Core Web Vitals went green and checkout conversions jumped 23%. I now add Jetpack to every site I build.
default.name: Rebecca Choi
default.title: Web Developer @ Choi Digital Studio

default.quote: Jetpack Stats finally helped me understand my audience without drowning in dashboards. I can see exactly which posts drive traffic and where readers drop off—without any of the complexity of GA4.
default.name: James Whitfield
default.title: Creator @ ModernPhotographyTips.com
